race.comment: OUR BRAVE LINI (5) is a talented filly who tackled tougher grade last time, finishing 9 lengths behind Fireball Miss over 2000m in the G2 The Roses at Doomben. Has been in sound form this prep with a win and a placing from three starts. Will find this assignment much easier and should prove very hard to stop. NOTABADJACKUP (2) ran a better race last start to finish a close third over 1540m at Gold Coast Poly. Suitably placed so anticipating another big run. BIG TECH (4) recorded his first win last start over 1800m at Sunshine Coast, getting home by 1.75 lengths. Will have derived a stack of confidence from that victory and should be involved in the finish. WEDDING VOW (6) is a last-start winner two-and-a-half weeks ago, scoring by 2 lengths over 1690m at Ipswich. Another bold showing is expected.
